name: qqman_execution_tool
description: Render Manhattan and QQ plots from GWAS-style summary statistics using the locally checked out qqman repository.

help.summary: Render qqman Manhattan and QQ plots for the active GWAS summary-statistics source.

modes.name: association
modes.description: Create Manhattan and QQ plots from a summary-statistics table containing CHR, BP, and P columns.

options.name: output_prefix
options.description: Optional prefix for output PNG files under the R plot output directory.

notes: Uses the active summary-statistics source by default.
The current ChatGenome build renders both Manhattan and QQ plots in one run.
